description: Building secure, scalable backend services with Java and Spring Boot, focusing on REST APIs, microservices, authentication, and high-performance enterprise applications.
Developing responsive and modern web applications using React and Next.js with a strong emphasis on performance, accessibility, and intuitive user experiences.
Building end-to-end applications by integrating scalable backends, modern frontends, and databases to deliver reliable, production-ready software.
Deploying and maintaining cloud-native applications with AWS, Docker, and automated CI/CD pipelines for secure, scalable, and reliable delivery.
